sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n90740" key="proxeili/dion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προχειλίδιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n90740.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">projecting part of the lip</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:2:90" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.90</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
